description: Curated seed registry for Dero Hive's MCP Discover tab. Entries were verified through 2026-07-10: repository live, install package published where applicable, and license checked.
notes: Windows: the MCP SDK's cross-spawn launcher resolves .cmd shims through ComSpec with escaped arguments.
Runtime prerequisites: 'node' servers need Node.js (npx); 'python' servers need uv (uvx) or pip.

Expansion: snapshot the official MCP Registry REST API (https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/v0/servers, frozen v0.1, unauthenticated, paginated JSON) and vet entries manually — its moderation policy says to assume minimal-to-no moderation, so pin a vetted snapshot rather than consuming the live feed.

punkpeye/awesome-mcp-servers (MIT, 90.5k stars, 52 categories) may be mined for additional entries if its copyright/license notice is preserved; it has NO per-server OS/local-first/official metadata (claim refuted 0-3), so derive those fields independently.
License note: the modelcontextprotocol/servers repo is transitioning MIT -> Apache-2.0; new contributions are Apache-2.0, unrelicensed older contributions remain MIT (LICENSE file, read 2026-07-09).

servers.name: Obsidian
servers.description: Connect to the active Obsidian vault through the Local REST API plugin's MCP endpoint.
servers.requiresConfig: Enable the Local REST API plugin, paste its API key as the bearer token, and trust its local HTTPS certificate. Alternatively use the plugin's loopback-only endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:27123/mcp/.

servers.name: Filesystem
servers.description: Secure file operations with configurable access controls. Pass one or more allowed directories as trailing arguments.
servers.requiresConfig: Replace <ALLOWED_DIR> with the directory (or directories) the server may access.

servers.name: Sequential Thinking
servers.description: Dynamic, reflective problem-solving through structured thought sequences.

servers.name: Everything (test server)
servers.description: Reference/test server exercising every MCP feature (prompts, resources, tools). Useful for testing Dero Hive's MCP client, not for end users.

servers.name: Fetch
servers.description: Web content fetching and conversion to LLM-friendly markdown.
servers.license: MIT (PyPI metadata; repo relicensing to Apache-2.0 in progress)

servers.name: Git
servers.description: Tools to read, search, and manipulate git repositories.
servers.license: MIT (PyPI metadata; repo relicensing to Apache-2.0 in progress)
servers.requiresConfig: Optionally pass --repository <path> to scope to one repo.

servers.name: Time
servers.license: MIT (PyPI metadata; repo relicensing to Apache-2.0 in progress)
